name: The Best Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, margarine, and sugar. Press the mixture into the bottom and sides of a 9 x 13 inch pan. Place in the refrigerator while preparing the cheesecake filling.
2. Beat egg yolks and sugar until well blended. Add lemon juice, vanilla, and cream cheese. Mix until smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cheesecake batter by hand.
4. Pour the batter over the crust in the prepared pan. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 25-30 minutes, or until set in the center.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool for 15 minutes. Spread sour cream mixture over the cooled cheesecake.
6. Sprinkle cinnamon and nutmeg on top of the cheesecake. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
